Notice Of Motion For Order Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Recevier, Exonerating All Bonds, Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver'S Acts And Transactions
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
ART HARRIS' Notice Of Motion For Order Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Recevier, Exonerating All Bonds, Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver'S Acts And Transactions is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting Directing From The Court
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: -
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion Requesting Direction From The Court regarding the appointment of a court appointed receiver- (See Order issued by the court on 1/23/12). No opposition filed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 (302/HEK)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
